title: LLM API Bootcamp
description: Theory-first curriculum (~2 hours). Maps console, HTTP/JSON requests, credit math, product picker, troubleshooting. For developers and agents wiring automation without drowning in docs.
one_sentence: An API is a remote service your software calls with a fixed question/answer format so a program gets work done without a human clicking buttons.

browser_vs_api.browser: You typing in grok.com or the app.
browser_vs_api.api: Your program calling the same models 24/7 with your API key and credits.
use_api_when: app button for a family member

console_fields.credits_remaining: Prepaid balance. Every API call deducts.
console_fields.api_key: Password for programs. Authorization Bearer header. Not your login password.
console_fields.auto_top_up: Optional for learning. Enable when production cannot afford downtime.

parts.example: JSON with model, input/messages, optional max_tokens

credit_rules.rule_of_thumb: 1 token ~ 3/4 English word. Text is cheap. Voice realtime and video burn fast.
learning_strategy: Phase 1 (week 1-2): short grok-4.3 tests, spend under $1
Phase 2: one bot or narration pipeline, cap max_tokens, log daily
Phase 3: auto top-up only when uptime matters

completion_criteria: Knows which product fits next build
Knows what would drain prepaid credits
